summary: Comprehensive testing of Group Chat App backend and frontend. Backend: 36/36 tests passed - all group CRUD, messaging, auth, contacts APIs working. Frontend: Login flow fixed (was routing to non-existent /(app) route), group chat messaging working, group creation screen functional. Minor design deprecation warnings present.

ui_bugs.issue: Login/Register were navigating to '/(app)' which doesn't exist - FIXED by changing to '/(tabs)'
React Native TouchableOpacity not easily clickable via standard Playwright selectors - requires JS evaluate workaround
ui_bugs.priority: LOW - testing limitation, not user-facing issue

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - cosmetic, not blocking

action_items: Update shadow* style props to boxShadow in styles (low priority, cosmetic warning)
Add data-testid attributes to interactive elements for easier automated testing
Consider adding Enter key support for sending messages in group chat
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: register.tsx had incorrect route '/(app)' instead of '/(tabs)' after login/register - this was causing 'Unmatched Route' errors
Minor: Console deprecation warnings for shadow* style props should be updated to boxShadow
Good: Backend API properly handles MongoDB ObjectId serialization
Good: WebSocket integration for real-time notifications is implemented

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Login/register flow fixed and working, group chat messaging verified, create group UI functional

seed_data_creation: Created dynamic test users with alphanumeric usernames during backend API tests. Existing testuser1 and testuser2 used for frontend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend all APIs working - 36 tests in /app/backend/tests/test_group_chat_api.py. Frontend routing issue fixed. Group chat messaging works (send via JS click workaround). Create group screen functional but TouchableOpacity buttons require JS evaluate to click. WebSocket tested implicitly via message sending.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In /app/frontend/app/auth/register.tsx, after successful login/register, the code was calling router.replace('/(app)') but no such route existed. The correct route is '/(tabs)'.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed both occurrences of router.replace('/(app)') to router.replace('/(tabs)') in register.tsx lines 94 and 106
rca_of_the_issue.verification: After fix, login successfully navigates to main chat screen showing groups and contacts
